attributes.title: [SQL Server OTel] Overview
attributes.description: High-level SQL Server health — batch throughput, connections, memory, concurrency, and errors.

params.markdown:
## [SQL Server OTel] Overview

This dashboard provides an overview of SQL Server health and performance:
- Batch request throughput and user connections
- Buffer pool health (page life expectancy, cache hit ratio)
- Concurrency (deadlocks, blocked processes, lock waits)
- Memory grants pending and execution errors

query.esql:
TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.batch.request.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.batch.request.rate)

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.batch.request.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.batch.request.rate)

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.user.connection.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS conn = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.user.connection.count)))

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.user.connection.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS conn = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.user.connection.count)))

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.hit_ratio IS NOT NULL
| STATS hit_ratio = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.hit_ratio)

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.hit_ratio IS NOT NULL
| STATS hit_ratio = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.hit_ratio)

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.deadlock.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.deadlock.rate)

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.deadlock.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.deadlock.rate)

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.processes.blocked IS NOT NULL
| STATS blocked = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.processes.blocked)))

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.processes.blocked IS NOT NULL
| STATS blocked = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.processes.blocked)))

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.batch.request.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.batch.request.rate) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.batch.request.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.batch.request.rate) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.user.connection.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS conn = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.user.connection.count))) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.user.connection.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS conn = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.user.connection.count))) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Deadlocks and blocked processes over time

query.esql:
TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.deadlock.rate IS NOT NULL OR metrics.sqlserver.processes.blocked IS NOT NULL
| STATS deadlocks = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.deadlock.rate), blocked = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.processes.blocked))) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL deadlocks = COALESCE(deadlocks, 0.0), blocked = COALESCE(blocked, 0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.deadlock.rate IS NOT NULL OR metrics.sqlserver.processes.blocked IS NOT NULL
| STATS deadlocks = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.deadlock.rate), blocked = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.processes.blocked))) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL deadlocks = COALESCE(deadlocks, 0.0), blocked = COALESCE(blocked, 0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Login vs logout rate over time

query.esql:
TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.login.rate IS NOT NULL OR metrics.sqlserver.logout.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS login_rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.login.rate), logout_rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.logout.rate) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| EVAL login_rate = COALESCE(login_rate, 0.0), logout_rate = COALESCE(logout_rate, 0.0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.login.rate IS NOT NULL OR metrics.sqlserver.logout.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS login_rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.login.rate), logout_rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.logout.rate) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| EVAL login_rate = COALESCE(login_rate, 0.0), logout_rate = COALESCE(logout_rate, 0.0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Top instances by batch request rate

query.esql:
TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| STATS batch_rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.batch.request.rate), conn = MAX(metrics.sqlserver.user.connection.count), ple = MAX(metrics.sqlserver.page.life_expectancy), hit_ratio = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.hit_ratio) BY instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT batch_rate DESC
| LIMIT 20

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| STATS batch_rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.batch.request.rate), conn = MAX(metrics.sqlserver.user.connection.count), ple = MAX(metrics.sqlserver.page.life_expectancy), hit_ratio = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.hit_ratio) BY instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT batch_rate DESC
| LIMIT 20
